description: Render and push styled pixel art, text, dashboards, and animations to Divoom Pixoo LED displays.
name: io.github.cyanheads/pixoo-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Device IP address on the local network (e.g. 192.168.1.50). Required for device tools; discovery and pure-render (push: false) work without it.
environmentVariables.name: PIXOO_IP

environmentVariables.description: Display size in pixels: 16, 32, or 64. Must match the physical device.
environmentVariables.name: PIXOO_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Directory for auto-saving preview PNG and GIF files. When unset, previews are returned in-response only.
environmentVariables.name: PIXOO_OUTPUT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Minimum interval between device pushes in milliseconds. Prevents device freeze from rapid-fire commands.
environmentVariables.name: PIXOO_PUSH_MIN_INTERVAL_MS

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
